headline: Bank Stocks Rally Ahead Of Earnings. Why Bullishness Is Growing.
summary: Big Bank stocks should see investment banking and trading revenues exceed prior guidance, JPMorgan said Monday ahead of the group's earnings next week. The firm also raised price targets for major bank stocks like Citigroup.

headline: T-Mobile stock gains as BofA upgrades to Buy, says satellite fears overblown
summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America on Monday upgraded T-Mobile U.S. to Buy from Neutral, reflecting a view that the market is overreacting to concerns about low-earth-orbit (LEO) satellite competition, with T-Mobile carrying the lowest exposure to that threat among major U.S. carriers.
